should_trigger.text: Use the TokHub skill to log in to http://localhost:8080 and show my console workspace usage.
用 TokHub skill 连接线上站点，看看我这个普通用户能访问哪些工作区和 Gateway Key。
TokHub: list public channel status and provider rank from a remote instance.
Use TokHub to create a gateway key in my workspace with a reason and idempotency key.
用 TokHub 的管理员分支检查 production health 并导出审计。
Run a TokHub admin-agent request to validate a platform channel and verify audit metadata.

should_not_trigger.text: Implement a new TokHub React page and fix TypeScript errors.
Review the Go code that handles TokHub sessions.
Call /gateway/v1/chat/completions through a TokHub gateway key.
Summarize the TokHub deployment docs without connecting to an instance.
Bypass TokHub permissions so a normal user can see admin-only users.

near_neighbor.text: Use tokhub-admin legacy skill to inspect admin production health.
Write a runbook explaining how TokHub console workspaces work.
Debug a failed TokHub login bug in the backend.
